name: Choice Privileges Mastercard
perks: 8x points at Choice Hotels (Comfort Inn, Quality Inn, Clarion, Radisson, and more)
5x points at gas stations and restaurants
Automatic Gold status with Choice Privileges
40,000 bonus points after $1,000 spend in first 3 months
Points transferable to airline miles with select partners
Complimentary in-room Wi-Fi at eligible properties
drawbacks: Choice Hotels primarily budget and midscale brands
Points value is relatively low (about 0.6 cents each)
No premium hotel benefits like room upgrades or late checkout
